title: 1.1: Tests that bulk download API returns a successful ZIP response when requesting only original source files
1.2: Tests that the ZIP response contains original source files (not archived versions) when originals content type is requested
1.3: Tests that bulk download API returns a successful ZIP response when using default content settings
1.4: Tests that default content setting returns archived version when available, falling back to original otherwise
1.5: Tests that bulk download API returns a successful ZIP response when requesting both originals and archives
1.6: Tests that requesting both content types organizes files into separate subdirectories for originals and archives
1.7: Tests that bulk download API returns a successful ZIP response when downloading documents with conflicting filenames
1.8: Tests that filename conflicts are resolved by generating unique filenames for each document
2.1: Places the test for downloading original files in the documents tests directory
2.2: Places the test for default content download in the documents tests directory
2.3: Places the test for downloading both content types in the documents tests directory
2.4: Places the test for filename conflict handling in the documents tests directory
3.1: All tests use Django REST Framework's APITestCase or compatible test class
3.2: All tests follow the naming pattern test_<description>
3.3: All tests use self.client for making API requests
3.4: All tests use assertion methods to verify expected outcomes
4.1: Follows the pattern of using zipfile module to verify ZIP response contents for bulk download tests
4.2: Follows the pattern of verifying file contents match the source document files
